name: Tagove
description: Developer of a multi-channel customer communication platform designed to transform the way companies connect with online customers. The company's platform provides live chat software that provides video chat, voice calling and text chat services with co-browsing and screen sharing facilities, enabling clients to communicate face-to-face with customers thus improving their performance and driving long-lasting customer engagement.

name: ActualConversion
description: Developer of data insights software designed to make better business decisions. The company's platform collects data generated by various marketing platforms used by a business, then filters and normalizes that data into a universal language with relevant business insights and recommendations, enabling businesses to streamline their marketing campaigns.

name: AI Palette
description: Stay ahead of consumer trends with real-time predictive analytics

name: App-CM
description: Developer of an in-line video ads platform designed to provide open-source video compression. The company's advertising platform uses unique video-player technology, without requiring large data traffic, to enable compression of up to one-tenth to one-twentieth in data volume compared to typical formats which are conventionally used for mobile video ad networks, enabling advertisers to publish their ad videos with peace of mind.

name: Beengo
description: Developer of an all-in-one digital restaurant platform designed to make the online ordering experience simple, seamless, and efficient. The company's platform captures customers' data to engage and communicate with them via any digital channel and helps in customer loyalty programs, helping clients with restaurant marketing, customer loyalty, and online ordering.

name: Appsamurai
description: Operator of an AI-powered, secure mobile user acquisition platform intended to help app owners, advertisers and publishers grow their apps. The company's platform creates different mobile advertisement campaigns and recommendations, tracks app store performance and tracks in-app events all from one single dashboard, enabling application developers and performance marketers to reach and acquire potential users with effective video campaigns and increase application downloads without much hassle or delay.

name: AtomX
description: Operator of an online advertising platform intended to allow advertisers, publishers, and intermediaries to control each impression. The company's platform offers an online marketplace that connects networks, demand-side platforms, supply-side platforms, and other parties and features pre- and post-bid fraud detection algorithms, advanced reports, and a control panel, enabling businesses to eliminate all fraud pre-bid and exercise full control over their advertisements.

name: Avegant
description: Developer of light field display technology designed for mixed-reality applications. The company's platform offers displays that can enable the visualization of virtual objects across multiple focal planes, replicating the way to view natural objects and enhancing the artificial intelligence journey, enabling users to change how people learn, play, work, and interact with each other through augmented reality experiences.

name: bith.tv
description: Developer of a video editor platform designed to promote gaming content. The company's platform provides a game arena, and a medium for content creators to showcase their talent through clip-sharing by offering them easy-to-use video editing and social media distribution tools, enabling content creators to create and edit their content to formats suitable for various social media platforms.

name: Blavity
description: Developer of a video curating and editing platform designed to economically support Black millennials across the African diaspora. The company's platform includes multicultural content and videos, built for and by passionate black millennials trying to add convenient balance to the way Black people are represented in media and culture, enabling users to get distinctive and original content as well as awareness regarding systemic racism.

name: BlueLeaf
description: Operator of a wealth management platform intended to expand access to quality financial advice. The company's platform offers account aggregation that automatically discovers assets, to provide a portal that reaches out to deliver value to clients by eliminating traditional reporting tasks and operational burdens, enabling financial advisors to increase their revenue and gain more clients.

name: Blue Wire
description: Developer of a sports podcasting platform intended to bring together a new generation of creators to create audio content. The company's network is made up of journalists, former athletes, and influential fans, building sports podcasting channels on various sports leagues and college football and soccer markets, enabling users to get updates about the sports.

name: Lummo
description: Developer of a financial application designed to assist micro and small businesses in their cash management. The company's application digitizes the physical record-keeping books by assisting enterprises to record their financial statements and profit management automatically, enabling businesses to easily track overall business performance and better monitor and manage cash flows.

name: Calo
description: Operator of a food-tech platform intended to provide nutritious meals. The company's platform provides a wide range of personalized meal plans as per diet requirements through nutritionist-approved algorithms, enabling users to get healthy food delivered to their doorstep with the help of an application.

name: Chikaku
description: Developer of an electronic device designed to connect remote family members. The company's device sends content, photos and videos taken with smartphones directly to the TV, enabling grandparents and family members living far away to interact with their grandchildren and relatives.

name: Cloud Commerce
description: Developer of a cross-border e-commerce platform designed to connect product data with the online markets globally. The company's platform provides features such as posting products, updating stock, managing orders and connecting transportation systems automatically, enabling online sellers to manage their online marketplace worldwide.

name: Comento
description: Operator of recruiting platform intended to connect job hunters with employment opportunities. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence algorithms to create training boot camp programs and talent referral matching services along with peer-to-peer counseling, enabling job seekers to find the right job.

name: Contently
description: Developer of a content-marketing platform designed to help global enterprises to create engaging and accountable content. The company's platform helps brands in creating, distributing, and optimizing content, enabling businesses to manage all corporate content in one place, streamline approval processes and optimize all aspects of content marketing.

name: Craon
description: Craon is the AI video editor that turns raw ideas into finished videos using simple prompts.

name: Crescendo Lab
description: Developer of a marketing technology intended for artificially intelligent marketing. The company provides LINE official account marketing, one-on-one in-depth interaction, enhance brand favor, promote sales, expand member data management, connect with the customer relationship management system, helping organizations gradually realize marketing automation.

name: Curio Labs
description: Operator of a news platform intended to transform news and publications into audio journalism. The company's platform personalizes the curated articles according to the users' interests from various global publications that are narrated by professional voice actors, enabling users to listen to the news offline and stay updated with current affairs.

name: Dealpad
description: Developer of sales enablement software designed to help companies realize the potential of their sales motion. The company's platform helps to understand the buyer's journey, and their decision criteria and offers a collaborative process to centralize everything, helping businesses develop the strategy and intel required to convert every sale and its performance.

name: Eat
description: Developer of a restaurant reservation platform designed to connect restaurants and diners. The company's platform helps restaurant operators manage table reservations with comprehensive floor planning features and customer history and provides a tool to publish targeted promotions and discounts, as well as helps users discover restaurants and book reservations, enabling customers to make reservations easily through a mobile application.

name: Ematic Solutions
description: Developer of an email marketing platform designed to assist brands with generating revenue using an email channel. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence with automated email segmentation, enabling brands and digital marketers to grow their customer database and revenue from every campaign.

name: Finomial
description: Developer of a cloud-based client life cycle management platform designed to connect the critical interactions between institutional and individual investors, fund managers, fund administrators, and custodians. The company's platform automates the hedge-fund subscription process, as well as offers investor analytics services, enabling clients to maximize returns on their investments, promote profitability and automate investor servicing from end to end.

name: Firefly
description: Operator of a targeted advertisement platform created to deliver outdoor marketing content. The company's platform installs proprietary displays atop ride-hailing vehicles and offers an out-of-home content marketing network that features outdoor advertising metrics and flexible targeting, enabling clients to deliver successful marketing and advertising strategies and measure where and when their campaign will have a greater impact throughout the city.

name: Alwans
description: Developer of a cloud-based restaurant management system designed to offer a holistic overview of the company and its operations. The company's system offers a tool for managing sales, transactions, inventory, employee schedules, logistics, e-commerce, and customer relationships, enabling businesses to increase their revenues and build relationships with diners.

name: FullContact
description: Developer of an identity resolution management platform intended to provide personalized connections between people and brands. The company's platform provides a smart cloud-based address book for users that transforms partial identities into complete profiles in order to connect with prospects and capture audience insights, enabling clients to resolve and enrich contact records for enhanced customer experience and authentic customer engagement.

name: Garaji
description: Developer of an automobile servicing platform designed to facilitate car repairing solutions comfortably. The company's platform provides users the information on garages, checks ratings, and availability, it also compares real-time prices, allowing users to choose from alternative service centers for their vehicles.

name: GetCraft
description: Provider of content network services designed to discover and connect to content creators and marketers across the globe. The company helps to find creators and sponsored channels for content marketing, influencer marketing, and bespoke native advertising needs, enabling companies and agencies to get high-quality content at an affordable price.

name: Storyhunter
description: Developer of a freelance management platform designed to empower free expression worldwide. The company's platform automatically matches assignments with the right talent to manage projects, crews and documents in one central place, enabling businesses to connect and work together with freelancers.

name: GoSky AI
description: Developer of social customer relationship management software (CRM) intended to improve marketing accuracy and efficiency. The company applies artificial intelligence technology for R&D of social CRM, its main products include member loyalty platform, marketing chatbot and advertisement deployment, enabling brands to convert their social media followers into prospective customers in a convenient way.

name: HiCustomer
description: Developer of a customer success platform designed to offer management tools to improve customer relationships. The company's platform aggregates and visualizes customer information such as usage status, communication history, sales, contact information, and many more, enabling clients to fully utilize the resources of their customer success team.

name: Impactyn
description: Developer of an AI-powered social media platform intended to bring a positive impact in the world of social media marketing. The company's platform connects everyone from big corporations to SMEs with real consumers through trusted, organic engagement and reach, enabling social media users to turn their organic social media content into online marketing through digital word of mouth that can be rewarded in cash or other benefits.

name: Influitive
description: Provider of an advocacy and engagement marketing platform designed to help companies discover, nurture, and mobilize their advocates to accelerate sales and increase customer lifetime value. The company's platform captures customer enthusiasm and uses it to turbocharge marketing and sales efforts for more rapid and profitable revenue growth, enabling advocates to convert prospects into customers and new customers into successful customers.

name: Infonesia
description: Developer of a knowledge-sharing platform designed to offer new experiences. The company's platform allows users to become creative question askers, share information and entertainment with a shout-out and get quick responses to their queries, enabling knowledge seekers and sharers to give and receive knowledge and earn income in the process.

name: Insider
description: Developer of an online marketing platform intended to optimize marketing spending and target online campaigns. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence and a unified data engine to individualize from a single platform and enhance cross-channel customer experiences, enabling clients to post campaigns with social networks and offer discounts only to those customers who are less likely to buy or subscribe.

name: Involve Asia
description: Developer of a digital marketing platform designed to help both brands and partners to scale their online earnings. The company's platform affiliates marketing and maximizes earnings through intelligent product and service recommendations, enabling brands to grow through effective marketing partnerships with content creators, developers and affiliates across the world.

name: Iterable
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-powered customer communication platform intended to help organizations activate customers with joyful interactions at scale. The company's platform offers user engagement campaigns throughout the full lifecycle, using contextual and behavior-driven data, proprietary algorithms, and artificial intelligence (AI) to determine the time for customer engagement and conversion, enabling marketers to safely send campaigns without risking channel fatigue.

name: JoySpace AI
description: Create Engaging Short Clips.

name: Jubilee
description: Provider of weekly digital videos intended to create a movement for human good. The company's videos convey the power of empathy for human good bridge people together and challenge conventional thinking, enabling customers to get motivated and create a positive impact in their lives.

name: Juleb
description: The company develops and provides integrated cloud platforms specifically designed for the healthcare sector, aiming to enhance efficiency and innovation. The company's platform features pharmacies and their interactions with connected entities, focusing on ease of use, cost-effectiveness, and adherence to local and international standards specific to each regional healthcare landscape, enabling pharmacies to optimize their performance and deliver improved value within the broader healthcare ecosystem.

name: Keatext
description: Developer of an AI-powered text analytics platform designed to synthesize feedback from multiple channels to produce insights delivered on one comprehensive dashboard. The company's platform uses deep learning applied to natural language processing to unlock the meaning behind volumes of text customer feedback by identifying topics that show up and interpret the sentiment and intent behind the comments, enabling clients to dive into the data and find key insights.

name: Kimola
description: Developer of a consumer research platform designed to provide audience-specific trends and lifestyle insights. The company's platform uses an artificial intelligence engine to profile consumers anonymously and detect the language and emotions of a text block, extract entities, and search within a large volume of unstructured text data, enabling marketers to build better marketing strategies, optimize media buying and increase return on investment with insights.

name: Likeable Local
description: Provider of social advertising services intended to automate social media for businesses. The company offers integrated software services for small businesses to create, enhance, and manage their social media presence through custom content creation, targeted media advertising, and an updated content library, enabling businesses to save time and resources and measure their growth.

name: Linkett
description: Developer of a digital signage analytics platform designed to offer live audience data for digital out-of-home advertising. The company's platform provides real-time, actionable insights by generating a series of performance reports for website impressions and dwell times as well as offers engagement and conversion metrics, enabling enterprises to increase their advertisement revenues as well as access real-time campaign analytics to measure and improve performance.

name: Mall IQ
description: Developer of an indoor location-based engagement and analytics platform designed to provide actionable insights. The company's platform contains features like indoor location tracking, detailed analytics, effortless fast setup, and behavior-based campaign, enabling banks, credit unions, fintech, loyalty platforms, and retailers to digitize real-time purchase intent in the physical world.

name: Markerly
description: Operator of an influencer marketing platform designed to connect brands with people. The company's platform helps to build a marketing network with full campaign management capabilities and influencer CRM (Customer Relationship Management) tools, enabling clients to create authentic experiences and persuasive repurposable content.

name: Uncodie
description: AI Growth Engine

name: Mentimeter
description: Developer of an audience engagement platform designed to transform conventional presentations into interactive experiences. The company's platform is used to create add polls, word clouds, quizzes, slides, and more, and help meetings, conferences, events, and training sessions to make them more productive and effective, enabling businesses to engage audiences and inspiring leaders to talk less and listen more.

name: My China Roots
description: We empower Asians to trace their ancestry and connect with roots & relatives; starting with Overseas Chinese.

name: myfavorito
description: Developer of a fan-empowered sponsorship platform intended to transform fan love into real money, so everyone wins. The company creates the playing field for sports with a radically different approach to sponsorship, enabling brands and companies that never previously engaged with sports will support thousands of sports clubs simultaneously.

name: Nookly
description: Quickly create personalized learning stories with AI

name: Nugit
description: Operator of a data analytics platform designed to offer data storytelling for digital marketing. The company's platform combines artificial intelligence, natural language generation, and visualizations in order to transform data into decision-ready reports which flow straight back into the workflow, enabling clients to create up-sell opportunities with automated and evocative data stories.

name: OFI
description: Operator of a managed services firm focused on digital transformation in automation services. The company offers a plethora of services, such as public cloud management, data center services, process automation, and development, and helps customers try new concepts and improve current return on investment to benefit from expertise at competitive pricing, thereby enabling clients to reach their potential through technological solutions that are suitable for their needs.

name: Olist
description: Operator of an online e-commerce site aggregation intended to facilitate direct sales on sites. The company's platform connects entrepreneurs with major online retailers and allows them to advertise and sell in the marketplaces without complication, enabling retail companies to reach out to the international marketplaces, improve the shopping experience and modify their purchasing behavior.

name: Novus Via
description: Developer of a cloud-based sales management platform designed to convert the complexity of customer relationship management into an achievable to-do list. The company's platform processes daily actions for various businesses and users, as well as offers products by email without requiring formal administration personnel, enabling clients to convert leads to customers and reach targets to grow their business.

name: Beeketing
description: Operator of a launching platform intended to empower brands to launch, grow, and succeed. The company's ecosystem of products promotes and improves the quality of e-commerce activities in general and cross-border commerce in particular, enabling businesses to plan and execute marketing strategies to increase sales and improve customer relationships automatically.

name: OpenSponsorship
description: Developer of a digital marketplace designed to offer assistance in finding sponsorship for professional sports. The company's platform connects corporate brands with athletes, events, and teams, using their partnership packages, enabling clients to make their events successful by getting connected with interested sponsors.

name: Rain
description: Developer of a location-based marketing application designed to promote businesses. The company offers marketing software that helps businesses reach local customers with mobile and local marketing technologies to buy and monitor local advertisements, enabling clients to target ideal customers based on multiple data points.

name: Playcurio
description: Developer of a learning platform designed to make learning fun through the combination of real teaching aids and digital contents. The company's platform offers augmented reality and virtual reality content with accessibility to tablets, pc, mobile, television and 3D animation and presents joy to children with quality digital contents, enabling children to learn while playing.

name: PlusMargin
description: Developer of a predictive marketing platform designed to assist e-commerce merchants in increasing their conversion rates and average order value. The company's platform analyzes a shopper's digital body language and predicts their purchase intent using advanced machine learning techniques, behavioral psychology, and statistical models to show personalized offers and messages that cater particularly to the users, enabling e-commerce merchants to analyze a customer's purchase intent, promote and sell their products.

name: Promolta
description: Operator of a self-serve video distribution platform intended to promote various YouTube videos. The company's online platform leverages technology to help musicians and artists distribute their videos on targeted blogs, sites, games, apps, and social networks, enabling clients to increase their reach and awareness.

name: Pyme
description: Developer of a web-based marketing platform designed for users to earn tokens, non-fungible tokens (NFTs), and other on-chain and off-chain rewards by completing quests. The company platform offers various features such as empowering to control the data, who sees data, and even, how users can make money from it, thereby enabling people to discover new web3 projects, unlock digital rewards, earn exclusive offers, access, and collectibles.

name: Quantum
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to offer specialized targeted market research and product testing campaigns. The company's platform offers intelligent matching, feedback, and analytics, enabling enterprises to increase business results and enhance profitability

name: ReserveOut
description: Operator of a restaurant and table management platform designed to bridge the gap between hospitality, entertainment, and dining service providers. The company allows users to search, view, and immediately reserve restaurants through a number of online channels, enabling restaurants and hotels to efficiently manage, track and sell resources and services available within their business.

name: Salasa
description: Operator of an e-commerce fulfillment company intended to help merchants scale up their business. The company offers ways, tools, and resources including handling and storing products, order processing, fast shipping, and return management, enabling e-commerce businesses to provide their customers with a seamless online shopping experience that helps them to generate sales and develop their brand.

name: Sampler
description: Provider of self-serve digital product sampling services intended to make it targeted, measurable, and turnkey. The company's services include capturing demographic and behavioral insights on every product sample with easy-to-read results, enabling businesses to understand the consumer analytics and preferences behind the product.

name: Screencloud
description: Developer of software designed to project videos, images, and social media onto digital signage screens. The company's software helps in the rapid development of modern hypertext markup language digital signage apps and deploys them across a network of screens, enabling advertisers to manage content on screens and control multiple screens at once.

name: Sheroes
description: Developer of a women's community platform designed to offer support, resources, opportunities, and interactions, discuss health, career, relationships, get work-from-home jobs, and more. The company's platform offers a diverse range of engagement formats to women, including corporate jobs, returning professionals programs, partner programs, part-time work, freelancing, and franchising, enabling women to find mentorship and career content while also helping them with personal advice via growth channels of community, content, champions, conversations, commerce, and companies.

name: Shoelace
description: Provider of an artificial intelligence-powered virtual assistant tool intended to help brands implement customer journey marketing. The company's tool helps e-commerce merchants launch retargeting campaigns on social media as well as takes visitors through a brand experience after they leave the store and keeps them engaged with a sequence of ad experiences, enabling brands to recapture visitors who abandon their website and increase sales.

name: Murmur Technologies INC
description: Developer of an advertising platform intended to provide mobility-based omnichannel advertising services. The company uses smart backpacks with screens attached to them, advanced artificial intelligence, and big data, enabling businesses to advertise and target people dynamically based on geo-locations, demography, and behavior.

name: Sightly
description: Developer of a video campaign analyzing platform designed to maximize the reach and effectiveness of video advertising. The company's platform offers software tools for audience targeting, campaign workflow, advertisement personalization, campaign automation, and an intelligent optimization engine, enabling clients to ensure fraud protection that helps them to reach their precise audience, as well as customers outside their current target.

name: Simplifai Labs
description: Developer of a marketing platform designed to target micro-moments that matter by combining image, sentiment and emotional recognition. The company's platform allows brands to reduce their digital marketing wastage, enabling them to increase brand safety and communication relevancy by manifolds.

name: Socialee
description: Developer of a video commerce platform designed to connect beauty content creators & consumers, through honest product reviews. The company combines an authentic product discovery experience with an e-commerce service that acts as a single destination to discover and learn about products through 60 to 90-second shoppable videos from friends, creators and brands, enabling users to get real reviews from real people, authentic beauty experts and their friends.

name: Squadle
description: Developer of a restaurant operations platform designed to digitize paper-based restaurant playbooks, checklists and compliance forms. The company's platform directs integration to hardware and sensors and gives a centralized view of store performance, enabling multi-unit operator restaurants to simplify complex operations and streamline food safety.

name: Fundable
description: Operator of a global startup launching platform intended to connect startup companies with customers, funding, mentors and instructors. The company's platform gives information regarding startups, investors, investment deals and other similar information from the business startup and financial world, as well as helps startups find customers, funding and mentors, enabling investors and startups to access a platform to explore private market information.

name: STORI AI Inc.
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based marketing content automation software designed for streamlining brand building & content creation. The company's software forms an isolated brand identity tailored to goals, defining archetype, tone, tagline, and colors for a strong presence, enabling clients to captivate the audience with visually stunning and emotionally engaging content.

name: Stuck
description: Developer of an on-demand technology platform designed to provide quality and hassle-free writing. The company's platform helps to provide translation from Arabic to English, proofreading of the documents, rephrasing and revamping the contents, content development, and language branding to create the desired tone and message, enabling individuals and businesses to get language support.

name: Talkable

The company's software identifies, targets, and rewards valuable customers through in-depth data analysis and offers A/B testing and ongoing campaign optimization, enabling users to create and optimize offers with pre-defined templates and to increase sales.

name: Tealet
description: Operator of an online retail platform designed to connect tea buyers directly with small family farms around the world. The company's platform uses technology and media to help people learn about a variety of teas, and offers videos from tea gardens and detailed profiles of farms, allowing customers to browse, preview, and purchase teas from individual growers.

name: TG3D Studio
description: Provider and developer of digitization designed for fashion industry. The company provides body and fabric digitization using 3D technology, enabling clients with design, manufacturing and innovative online shopping experience.

name: Trend
description:
Trend is building the world’s largest decentralized creative AI powered studio. Trend automates content creation for brands and replaces their creative agencies.

On track for generating $1m+ this year

Customers like Nestle, Huel, Unilever

Backed by Flybridge, Pharrell Williams, Techstars Ventures, founders of Twitch, Rotten Tomatoes, Kabam, Crunchyroll etc.

name: Tripitaca

The company's platform allows hosts to create their packages and sell directly to travelers eliminating the need for agents and middlemen, enabling businesses to have a platform that notifies them when travellers are looking for properties which increases their chances of getting booked.

name: Vbout

The company's platform includes email and social media tools, lead intelligence, and comprehensive analytics while also assisting in creating a sales funnel to convert visitors into leads by nurturing them with automated, personalized content, enabling clients to make their marketing efforts efficient and effective, all from one dashboard.

name: Volt
description: Tu WhatsApp de reservas para que los clientes agenden solos

name: Whelp

name: Woowup

The company's platform converts the fans of a company into customers using a loyalty program on the website of the company or the Facebook fan page, allows integration with any sales channel, identifies the user as a single channel, and manages all point purchase and redemption interactions, enabling retailers to retain customers using automated marketing tools and artificial intelligence to predict purchases.

name: Zest
description: Operator of an investment services platform intended to democratize access to venture, empowering investors, founders, and their companies on one platform. name: Zoomforth

name: LaunchRock
description: Developer of viral setup launching page. The company provide a platform to incentivize and reward the users for telling others about their projects through email & social networks.

name: Campanja

name: Julu Mobile
description: Owner and operator of a mobile advertising platform. The comapny uses mobile interaction information of users to send them relevant offers.

name: Newoldstamp
description: Developer of an email signature platform designed to turn employee's email into a powerful marketing tool. name: Rapportive
description: Provider of contextual information about GMail contacts. The company provides a plug-in that shows information about contacts inside the Gmail inbox. It also provides imagine relationship management built into email systems.

name: Sverve
description: Provider of a self-service influencer marketing platform for small businesses. The company provides a technology to manage and track social media influencer campaigns all at one place. It builds deep profiles of influencers, capturing their reach, topics, demographics and retailer affinities along with our proprietary performance metrics. It also help brands connect and work with the right influencers, enable automated payments, and track cross-channel results of their campaigns.

name: postcron
description: Developer of a tool designed to allow brands to build and run any kind of promotion. The company's tool allows companies to easily install raffles, image contests and a collection of more than 20 applications on their Fan Page, enabling agencies and marketers to attract more fans, increase interaction with their audience and boost the company's sales through From Facebook.

name: ClippPR

name: Uninstall

The company's data analysis platform uses an internal proprietary prediction engine that measures all huerstics and utilizes historical data to determine exactly which lot of users are going to uninstall an application in the next few days, enabling mobile application developers to engage with these users and prevent them from uninstalling.

name: YouScan

The company's lead generation tools analyzes millions of public social media posts and uses sophisticated language processing algorithms to find social media messages that express an intention to buy a certain product or service, enabling businesses that provide relevant products or services to reach out to the author of the messages.

name: Punchd
description: Provider of digital loyalty card services. The company provides a replacement for the buy-10-get-1-free cards with a mobile loyalty system.

name: ZipDial
description: Provider of mobile marketing services. The company provides consumer intelligence platform that drives services such as couponing, friend referrals, on-pack activations.

The company's holistic technology platform provides a customized mobile applications that offer loyalty, guest feedback, ordering, mobile payment and gift cards which are integrated into the point-of-sale for a seamless in-store execution, enabling brands to better understand and engage with their customers.

name: OneSpot
description: Developer of a content marketing platform designed to personalize branded content across websites, email, paid media and more, The company's content marketing platform uses machine learning technology that automatically surfaces the most personally relevant content to the visitors across channels and continually improves content recommendations of the visitors to keep them coming back and reading more of the content. enabling brands to build strong content-based relationships, provide measurable audience and content insights and drive quantifiable results.

name: RepublicProject
description: Republic Project offers a cloud-based ad platform that makes it easy to scale campaigns, meet demand, and optimize performance in real time.

name: Innohub
description: Developer of automated data analysis and visualization platform designed to make data accessible and insightful. The company's automated data analysis and visualization platform offers data automation, data integration and analysis, enabling companies and their employees to request, analyze and visualize internal business data to quickly capitalize on hidden trends and improve organizational productivity.

name: Launchbit
description: Provider of an advertisement platform for email. The company's model allows advertisers to identify their target demographic and bid on ad impressions in email newsletters.

name: Novocall
description: Developer of web callback service platform intended to convert web visitors into call leads. The company's platform captures and distributes qualified sales call leads for inside sales and sales teams, enabling website visitors to request an instant callback from the company faster.

name: Enplug

The company's digital signage platform helps to instantly deploy content across many displays and create modern and interactive experience for their audience by featuring live social media walls from social media, enabling marketers and communicators to keeps content relevant and timely to increase audience engagement.

name: Market Vibe
description: Provider of hassle-free marketing optimization tools. The company uses customers web analytics and shopping cart data to teach companies how to get more traffic, leads and sales.

name: OneKitchen

The company provides tailored spaces for dark kitchens to operate and allows chefs to launch and sell on delivery platforms within days, allowing chefs and restaurant owners to launch their new restaurant from scratch, fine-tune their menu, optimize their operations and maximize their sales.

The company's mobile data marketplace processes over 250 billion data points on over 500 million mobile devices each day as well as develops a digital infrastructure to move offline and online data into the mobile environment, enabling mobile advertising networks, publishers and marketers to access to an unprecedented amount of person-level data.

name: Sonar

The company's customer engagement tool sends automated messages based on customer actions, enabling businesses to communicate with customers and vice versa over mobile messaging channels.

name: Turnstyle

name: Fanbread

name: Brainient

name: Heyo

name: UserFox
description: Provider of a user retention as a service for startups. The provides a service that provides startups to integrate drip, inactivity and trigger emails.

name: Vurve
description: Creator of marketing application for online businesses. The company operates a platform with a gallery of e-commerce-related apps, and also creates applications to build brand awareness, enhance distribution and improve site sales.

name: Upcode Academy
